entityIds.miParentLinkRule: When identityType == ManagedIdentity, append { type: AzureResourceId, id: <attachedResourceId>, relation: attached_to } so MI joins to parent ARM resource

hashes.name: CollectHash
hashes.description: Hash of every phase=in field. Detects upstream drift in raw collected data.

hashes.name: ProfileHash
hashes.description: Hash of every phase=profile field plus rule-set hash. Lets KQL summarize arg_max(CollectionTime,*) by PrimaryEntityId, ProfileHash show only verdict-changing snapshots.

entra._policy: include-only (default-deny). Only paths listed here flow to Properties.collect.entra. New MS fields are NOT auto-included -- monthly schema-drift detection adds them after review.

mdi._policy: include-only (default-deny). Monthly schema-drift detection adds new MS fields after review.

exposureGraph._policy: include-only (default-deny). Monthly schema-drift detection adds new MS fields after review.

perIdentityTypeRouting.reason: delegated flows appear as AppId in NonInteractive

signInLogs.aggregationPattern: One bulk query per LA table per snapshot (NEVER per identity); join back in PowerShell. Pattern: SigninLogs | summarize ... by UserId.

contributors.rationale: Catalog match — PIM-eligible role still IS a T0 role per catalog; weight 1.0
Catalog match — delegated permission still IS the cataloged tier; weight 1.0
EG criticality is catalog-driven but uses MS-defined scoring rather than your PrivilegeTierClassifier catalog; slight discount
Catalog match against UacFlag_Tiering — deterministic; weight 1.0

aiEligibility.note: Identity engine is currently catalog-driven and does not call AI. ai_eligibility shown for future enablement; -DisableAI is a no-op for identity today.

derivation.algorithm: alias of DisplayName -- shared cross-engine asset-name field for consistent reporting / dashboards
alias of PrimaryEntityId (= Entra ObjectId for users / SPs / MIs / groups) -- shared cross-engine asset-id field for consistent reporting / dashboards
alias of ObjectType (User / ServicePrincipal / ManagedIdentity / Group / ServiceAccount / Computer) -- shared cross-engine asset-type field for consistent reporting / dashboards
v2.1-style alias of IdentityType -- emits 'User' / 'ServicePrincipal' / 'ManagedIdentity' / 'Group' / 'ServiceAccount' / 'Computer'. Kept for back-compat with legacy SI_IdentityAssets_CL queries.

fields.name: CSA
fields.sourcePath: Concatenation of customSecurityAttributes assignments as 'set/attribute=value' pairs (e.g. 'SecurityInsight/AssetTier=tier-0; SecurityInsight/RegulatoryScope=PCI'). Source: graph.user.customSecurityAttributes / graph.servicePrincipal.customSecurityAttributes. Asset-tagging KQL parses the CSA string with extract(@"tier-(\d+)", 1, tostring(CSA)).

derivation.algorithm: MfaState matches none|notRegistered|notCapable, AND not an SPN
EntraAppPermissions_Application | EntraRoles_Permanent | EntraRoles_Eligible intersects high-risk list (Directory.ReadWrite.All, RoleManagement.ReadWrite.Directory, ...)

fields.name: cmdbId
fields.sourcePath: cmdb.id (CMDB row primary key when matched at Reconcile)

derivation.algorithm: Reconcile-stage classification of how the asset was matched to CMDB: rule / identity / orphan / stale-cache / gap-cis
Reconcile-stage match outcome: matched / unmatched / ambiguous

fields.name: IsExternalUser
fields.sourcePath: eg.user.NodeProperties.rawData.externalUser. B2B guest indicator -- different threat model.

fields.name: IsMfaRegistered
fields.sourcePath: eg.user.NodeProperties.rawData.isMfaRegistered. More granular than current MFA tracking -- capable != registered != enforced.

fields.name: EntraAccountObjectId
fields.sourcePath: eg.user.NodeProperties.rawData.accountObjectId. Direct Entra link -- feeds the Entra portal link in MoreDetails.
